---
title: Retreat A2
slug: retreat-a2
type: post
status: draft
category: Landscape
tags: [forest, cabin]
heroImage: 04-retreat-a2.jpg
excerpt: "A glass-and-cedar cabin in Norwegian fjord country — three seasons, one structure."
---

A small commercial commission for a private hospitality client. The brief was to photograph their newly completed retreat in a way that captured solitude rather than luxury — closer to a Nordic monograph than a travel brochure.
